articles.title: Panama bow out of 2026 FIFA World Cup as the only team to score zero goals
articles.description: Panama's quest for World Cup glory in 2026 ended with a disappointing 2-0 defeat to England, making them the only team in the tournament to exit without scoring a goal. While they displayed a sturdy defense in matches against Ghana and Croatia, their attack faltered completely. Panama, despite their seasoned squad, remains in pursuit of their inaugural World Cup win.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup: Nikola Vlasic's late header lifts Croatia past Ghana to seal 2nd place in Group L
articles.description: Croatia secured a dramatic 2-1 victory over Ghana, thanks to Nikola Vlasic's late header from a Luka Modric corner. The win clinched second place in Group L for Croatia, setting them up for a clash with Portugal or Colombia. Ghana, already qualified, finished third despite Derrick Luckassen's debut equalizer, which was subject to a lengthy VAR review.

articles.title: Sunday Motivation Quote by Muhammad Ali: ‘It’s the repetition of affirmations that leads to belief and once that belief becomes a...’ Inspiring words by boxing legend
articles.description: Boxing legend Muhammad Ali's profound impact extends beyond his athletic prowess. His unwavering self-belief, cultivated through consistent affirmations, fueled his success in and out of the ring. Ali's philosophy highlights how repeating positive declarations can transform into deep conviction, ultimately shaping reality and leading to extraordinary achievements. This powerful message serves as Sunday motivation, encouraging us to nurture our own beliefs.
